question: My partner and I argue about the same issues repeatedly and never resolve them. What is keeping us stuck in these patterns?
My spouse had an affair six months ago. We want to try to save the marriage. Is recovery from infidelity really possible and what does it take?
I feel emotionally disconnected from my partner. We're like roommates. How does couples therapy address emotional disconnection?
My partner and I fight constantly and I feel contempt toward them sometimes. I've heard this is very damaging. Is contempt in a relationship a dealbreaker?
We are a blended family and my teenagers refuse to accept my new spouse. How do therapists help blended families navigate these dynamics?
I am the pursuer in my relationship — I always chase connection while my partner withdraws. How does emotionally focused therapy (EFT) address this dynamic?
My husband and I have very different parenting styles and it is causing serious conflict. How do we get on the same page?
I want to start premarital counseling with my partner. What topics should we discuss and what are the benefits of premarital therapy?
My partner shuts down completely during conflict and won't talk for days. My therapist called this stonewalling. What is it and how do we break this pattern?
I want couples therapy but my partner refuses to go. Can individual therapy help if only one person in a couple participates?
We have very different libidos and it's causing tension. How does a couples therapist approach sexual compatibility issues?
My teenager has become aggressive and defiant at home. How does family therapy help with adolescent behavior problems?
I have an anxious attachment style and my partner has an avoidant style. How does attachment theory explain the problems in our relationship?
We're going through a divorce with children. How do I protect my kids from the impact of our separation and what does healthy co-parenting look like?
I grew up in a chaotic family and I keep repeating the same relationship patterns. How do family-of-origin issues affect adult relationships?
My partner and I argue constantly about money. How does a therapist help couples work through financial conflict?
I have a very controlling mother-in-law and my spouse takes her side against me. How do couples therapists address in-law conflict?
We have had a lot of conflict since having children. Our relationship has changed completely. Is it common for couples to struggle with the transition to parenthood?
My partner criticizes me frequently and I feel I can do nothing right. My therapist said this is one of Gottman's Four Horsemen. What does this mean?
I have been married 20 years and I am questioning whether I still love my partner. Is falling out of love permanent or can therapy help rebuild connection?
I suspect my partner is in a relationship with a narcissist. What are the signs of a narcissistic relationship and how does therapy help?
My family has a secret — a member who is not spoken about. Family members become angry when the topic comes up. How does family therapy address family secrets?
I am a same-sex couple facing family rejection. How does an MFT approach the unique stressors faced by LGBTQ+ couples and families?
I want to discuss opening our relationship with my partner. How do therapists approach conversations about non-monogamy?
My spouse has depression and it is affecting our entire family. How does a family therapist approach depression in one family member?
My adult child has moved back home and it is causing conflict with my spouse. How do we manage this transition as a couple?
We have very different cultural backgrounds and it creates misunderstandings and conflict. How does multicultural couples therapy address cultural differences?
I feel like I give everything in my relationship and get little back. My therapist mentioned relationship reciprocity. How do you restore balance in an unequal relationship?
My child witnessed domestic violence. They are having behavioral problems and nightmares. How does a family therapist address trauma in children?
My partner and I are considering divorce. Should we try couples therapy first or is it too late if we are already thinking about separation?
